tracks.meaning: a useful or valuable thing, especially money or property owned by a person or company
a person or thing that is useful or valuable to an organization or project
property or money belonging to a person or estate that can be claimed by creditors or distributed in legal proceedings
a resource or file managed by a software system or operating system
a piece of military equipment or personnel considered as a resource or advantage
a person or thing that is helpful, impressive, or worth having
